title: The Eden
description:
Add the new dimension named "The Eden".
You can live a peaceful life with sheep.
If you achieved "quests", You may get fantastic wool!
body:
This mod requires Minecraft Forge version 1.20.1 and was created using MCreator (https://mcreator.net/).

The Eden is a dimension with no enemies but with many sheep. You can live a peaceful life there.

Would you like to visit? Create a portal shaped like a Nether portal, using glowstone instead of obsidian. Once the portal is built, it can be opened using the 'Key of The Eden', created by right-clicking on water with holding a gold bar!

If you're concerned about collecting enough glowstones, don't worry! Overworld caves are rich in Glowstone Ores.

Collect wool, complete quests, and summon sisters. 

For further information, please visit my blog (written in Japanese).
